mapper.select: SELECT sc.id ,u.nickname AS user_name,c.title,t.nickname AS teacher_name,sc.select_time,sc.status,sc.progress FROM student_course sc LEFT JOIN user u ON sc.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user t ON c.teacher_id = t.id

SELECT sc.id ,u.nickname AS user_name,c.title, sc.course_id,t.nickname AS teacher_name,sc.select_time,sc.status,sc.progress FROM student_course sc LEFT JOIN user u ON sc.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{nickname},'%')

SELECT sc.id ,u.username AS username,u.nickname AS nickname,u.avatar,sc.progress,SUM(a.score) AS total_score FROM student_course sc LEFT JOIN user u ON sc.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user t ON c.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN activity_discussion_record a on a.student_id = sc.student_id WHERE sc.course_id = #{id} GROUP BY sc.id
